---
title: "Instructor Course"
format: html
---

## Overview

The **POCUS-CARE Instructor Course** prepares experienced POCUS practitioners to teach within the POCUS-CARE educational programme.

The course focuses on educational methods, practical teaching skills, learner assessment, and quality assurance in addition to advanced ultrasound instruction.

## Course objectives

After completing the programme, participants will be able to:

- Teach the POCUS-CARE curriculum using standardised educational methods.
- Demonstrate effective bedside teaching and practical instruction.
- Supervise hands-on ultrasound workshops.
- Assess learner performance using structured assessment tools.
- Deliver constructive feedback.
- Contribute to the continuous improvement of the national POCUS-CARE programme.

## Target audience

Healthcare professionals with previous experience in point-of-care ultrasound who wish to become certified POCUS-CARE instructors.

## Prerequisites

Applicants should:

- Hold a POCUS-CARE Provider Certificate (or demonstrate equivalent competence).
- Have regular clinical experience using point-of-care ultrasound.
- Demonstrate motivation for medical education.
- Be recommended by their local training programme whenever applicable.

## Instructor Journey

- Potential Instructors (PIs) are identified during Provider Sessions, by the instructors
- PIs and external invited instructors participate in a Training of Trainers (ToT) Session
- Obtention of the POCUS-CARE Instructor Course Completion Certificate grants the status of Junior Instructor (JI)
- Junior Instructors participate in instruction during Provider courses, alongside a Senior Instructor
- Junior Instructors may apply to the status of Senior Instructor after participation at at least two Provider courses as instructor

## Instructor responsibilities

Certified instructors are expected to:

- Teach according to the POCUS-CARE curriculum.
- Maintain high educational standards.
- Participate in quality improvement activities.
- Support the development of future instructors.
- Contribute to the sustainability of national training programmes.

## Upcoming sessions

Visit the [**Course Overview page**](training.qmd) for announcements about future sessions.
